name: rust-studio
description: Turn a single Claude Code session into a full Rust engineering studio. Tiered agent team (architect -> leads -> specialists), path-scoped Rust standards, quality gates, and cargo-aware hooks across libraries, async/web services, CLIs, and systems/embedded code.

test_runner.title: Default test runner
test_runner.description: Test runner the studio prefers (cargo-nextest recommended). Surfaced in the session briefing so agents honor it.

gate_intensity.title: Default gate intensity
gate_intensity.description: Default rigor for quality gates and reviews: full, lean, or solo. Surfaced in the session briefing.

default_msrv.title: House MSRV fallback
default_msrv.description: Minimum supported Rust version to assume when a Cargo.toml does not declare rust-version (e.g. 1.82). Leave empty to keep showing "(unset)".
